mapper.select: select id, course_name, course_days, teaching_mode, material_path, created_at, updated_at from sys_course where id = #{id}

select id, course_name, course_days, teaching_mode, material_path, created_at, updated_at from sys_course
and course_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_course (course_name, course_days, teaching_mode, material_path, created_at, updated_at) values (#{courseName}, #{courseDays}, #{teachingMode}, #{materialPath}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_course set course_name = #{courseName}, course_days = #{courseDays}, teaching_mode = #{teachingMode}, material_path = #{materialPath}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_course set course_days = #{courseDays}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
